creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Gunther Schadow from comment #7)

> … What if someone by accident dumps a password into a comment? 
> Or some other private info?

For readers who may be unaware: I do know that bugmeister can delete the content of an attachment. I assume that the same can be done (by bugmeister) with the content of a comment.
